name: Lissandra

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Iceborn Subjugation
passive.description_source: Innate: Whenever an enemy champion dies while  Lissandra is nearby, she spawns a Frozen Thrall from their corpse.

effects.description: Innate: Whenever a nearby enemy champion dies, Lissandra spawns a Frozen Thrall from their corpse.Frozen Thralls are ice spirits that have 33.48 : 325 (based on seconds alive) movement speed and slow nearby enemies by 25%. They will chase nearby visible enemies for 4 seconds, prioritizing champions, after which they shatter to deal 120 : 580 (based on level) (+ 50% AP) magic damage to nearby enemies.

passive.description: Innate: Whenever a nearby enemy champion dies, Lissandra spawns a Frozen Thrall from their corpse.Frozen Thralls are ice spirits that have 33.48 : 325 (based on seconds alive) movement speed and slow nearby enemies by 25%. They will chase nearby visible enemies for 4 seconds, prioritizing champions, after which they shatter to deal 120 : 580 (based on level) (+ 50% AP) magic damage to nearby enemies.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Thralls are units that are considered champions (they are clones) and they take the form of the champion they arise from.

basic_ability_1.name: Ice Shard
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Lissandra throws a spear of ice in the target direction that  slows the first target hit and deals magic damage to all enemies it passes through.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lissandra launches a shard of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage and slows enemies hit for 1.5 seconds.
Active: Lissandra launches a shard of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage and slows enemies hit for 1.5 seconds.

effects.description: If Ice Shard hits an enemy, it will shatter, increasing its width and maximum range.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Lissandra launches a shard of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage and slows enemies hit for 1.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.

basic_ability_2.name: Ring of Frost
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Lissandra freezes nearby enemies, dealing magic damage and briefly  rooting them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lissandra freezes nearby enemies, dealing magic damage and rooting them for a duration.
Active: Lissandra freezes nearby enemies, dealing magic damage and rooting them for a duration.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Lissandra freezes nearby enemies, dealing magic damage and rooting them for a duration.

basic_ability_3.name: Glacial Path
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Lissandra sends a claw of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies it passes through. Glacial Path can be recast while the claw is active.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lissandra sends a claw of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies it passes through, decelerating over 1.25 seconds.

effects.description: Recast: Lissandra consumes the claw and blinks to its current location.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Lissandra sends a claw of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies it passes through, decelerating over 1.25 seconds. Glacial Path can be recast after 0.5 seconds while the claw is active.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Both casts count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

ultimate.name: Frozen Tomb
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Lissandra can cast Frozen Tomb on herself or an enemy champion.

effects.description: Active: Lissandra can cast Frozen Tomb on herself or an enemy champion.
Enemy Cast: Lissandra freezes the target enemy champion, knocking them down and stunning them for 1.5 seconds.

effects.context_notes: Self Cast: Lissandra instantly entombs herself in ice, entering stasis for 2.5 seconds and healing herself every 0.25 seconds over the duration.
Self Cast: Lissandra instantly entombs herself in ice, entering stasis for 2.5 seconds and healing herself every 0.25 seconds over the duration.
Self Cast: Lissandra instantly entombs herself in ice, entering stasis for 2.5 seconds and healing herself every 0.25 seconds over the duration.
Self Cast: Lissandra instantly entombs herself in ice, entering stasis for 2.5 seconds and healing herself every 0.25 seconds over the duration.

Frozen Tomb creates a field of ice that spreads out from the target over 1.5 seconds and covers the surrounding area for 3 seconds, dealing magic damage to enemies and slowing them for 0.5 seconds, refreshing every 0.25 seconds while they remain within.

Frozen Tomb creates a field of ice that spreads out from the target over 1.5 seconds and covers the surrounding area for 3 seconds, dealing magic damage to enemies and slowing them for 0.5 seconds, refreshing every 0.25 seconds while they remain within.

ultimate.description: Active: Lissandra can cast Frozen Tomb on herself or an enemy champion.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Enemies can only be damaged by the field of ice once every 4 seconds.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual behavior-fidelity verification for ability timing, cadence, and player-visible execution semantics

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
